items.title: Early Prime Day deals drop Amazon’s eero 6 and Pro 6E mesh Wi-Fi routers to lowest prices from just $50
items.summary:
If you’re looking to fix the spotty Wi-Fi at home, the eero Pro 6E mesh system is a good option to consider – currently starting at $149.99 shipped at Amazon. This is originally a $299 unit that has more recently been going for $200. Today’s deal takes $50 off its usual going rate to mark the lowest price we have tracked for it to date. In addition to this deal on the single-node system, the dual, triple, and four-node systems are also discounted right now with up to $170 in savings. Notably, you’ll also find the eero 6 mesh Wi-Fi routers on sale, with prices starting at just $49.99 shipped. These are some early Prime Day offers, which are now live ahead of the big sale event later this month, so be sure to jump in and snag them after getting more details below.

items.title: Amazon delivering almost all base MacBook Neo models as early as tomorrow from $590, still up to 2 weeks from Apple
items.summary:
Update 6/1: The MacBook Neo delivery times in this post have now been updated – all but one configuration is delivering by tomorrow.

Apple’s new MacBook Neo made headlines everywhere, delivering the most affordable new MacBook solution in years and Apple has has a hard time keeping up with demand to some degree. There is still a 1 to 2 week wait time for deliveries on the base model straight from Apple, but Amazon is now shipping all colors at $10 less and delivering them as early as tomorrow.
